test.observation: All 250 tests passed across all crates

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skill naming conventions: AGENTS.md defines a 'Rust' skill but workers may search for 'rust-worker'. Either rename the skill in AGENTS.md to match what workers expect, or document the correct skill name more prominently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-cli-socket-bug (worker session 15276d13) attempted to invoke non-existent 'rust-worker' skill, then successfully used 'Rust' skill instead. This mismatch caused confusion and potential delays.

rejectedObservations.observation: No test coverage for socket read behavior in swell-cli crate
rejectedObservations.reason: While this is a valid gap, the fix-cli-socket-bug feature was specifically scoped to fixing the immediate bug. Adding test coverage would be a separate feature work item, not within scope of this fix.
